message.content:
@startuml
participant "File" as File
participant "LexicalAnalysisDriver" as LAD
participant "LexicalAnalysisJava" as LAJ
participant "JavaSyntaxLib" as JSL
participant "TypeCheck" as TC
participant "ColorCode" as CC
participant "ErrorCheck" as EC

File -> LAD : invokes
LAD -> LAJ : Calls
LAJ -> JSL : Calls
JSL --> LAJ : 
LAJ -> TC : SyntaxTypeCheck()
TC --> File : Return(TypeCheck)
LAJ -> CC : SyntaxColorCheck()
CC --> File : Return(ColorCode)
LAJ -> EC : SyntaxErrorCheck()

alt [successful case]
    EC --> File : Error Free
else [Error Case]
    EC --> File : Return Error Message
end

@enduml
